content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates strong methodology fidelity through restrained, well-placed signature moves rather than vocabulary decoration. Turn 4 ('What's in your body right now, as you say that?') is a near-verbatim AoA body-locating question deployed at the right moment after a 'fine' response — exactly the move the expected territory calls for. Turn 6 ('I notice you looked away — what was that?') is a clean noticing/somatic-tracking move that meets resistance with curiosity rather than argument. Turns 10/12 (failure/success symmetry) function as a calibration probe that lets the client themselves notice the flatness in both directions — leading to the 'huh' recognition in turn 13, which is precisely the breakthrough texture described in the profile. Turn 14 ('Stay with that for a second') is the canonical feel-over-figure / stay-with-it move at the exact moment numbness becomes felt. Critically, the coach avoids all the traps: no arguing the fearlessness, no pushing toward fear, no validating the fearless self-concept, no diagnosing dissociation, no teaching. No anti-AoA frames appear. Few hits, all appropriate, with the key concept (staying with the texture of 'fine') properly invoked when live.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with an experiential probe rather than analysis — fits AoA stance."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature body-locating question deployed at the right moment after 'fine.'"},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks somatic micro-signal (looked away) without interpreting it — clean noticing move."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Mild reflection of the incongruence; not a signature question but appropriate and non-pushy."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Failure probe — could risk pushing toward fear, but framed openly enough to let texture emerge."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Success probe creates the symmetry that surfaces the flatness — calibrated use of contrast."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Classic 'stay with that' / feel-over-figure move at the precise moment the numbness becomes noticed."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-happiness-filter", "disassociating-in-the-coaching-room", "meet-resistance-with-okay"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "two-words-for-fear", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head"],
  "notes": "The coach didn't deploy explicit named concepts, but the methodology is enacted rather than quoted — which is the higher form of fidelity. The territory misses are appropriate omissions given the session arc landed on numbness recognition, which the profile describes as the correct stopping point."
}
